'''Dopey''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" /> In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]],<ref name="Date note" /> Dopey was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action while piloting a [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing]] in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]].<ref name="CSWE" />
